nodes.label: AI as feedback transformation tool
nodes.label_negative: Manual feedback writing from scattered notes
nodes.grounding_span: AI is useful for transforming these notes into actionable advice

nodes.label: AI for email summarization and response
nodes.grounding_span: I also sometimes use AI to make summaries of long emails or generate responses to emails

nodes.label: AI for PowerPoint slide generation
nodes.grounding_span: I have tried to use AI to make powerpoint lecture slides

nodes.label: Human grading preserving contextual understanding
nodes.label_negative: AI grading missing finer details and context
nodes.grounding_span: I always grade papers manually, even though AI can do a decent job

nodes.label: Social acceptance of AI use in academia
nodes.grounding_span: it's not exactly common or even socially accepted

nodes.label: AI as temptation for grunt work vs. corrosive influence
nodes.label_negative: Resisting AI to preserve critical thinking
nodes.grounding_span: using AI is hard to resist for grunt work

nodes.label: Efficiency in routine tasks
nodes.grounding_span: AI is useful for transforming these notes into actionable advice

nodes.label: Pedagogical integrity and student understanding
nodes.grounding_span: It feels important for me to parse what my student is trying to say

nodes.label: Social belonging and professional identity
nodes.grounding_span: I would probably use AI more often if my colleagues were more enthusiastic about it

nodes.label: Critical thinking preservation
nodes.grounding_span: I think my students will be worse critical thinkers

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for feedback transformation
nodes.grounding_span: AI is useful for transforming these notes into actionable advice

nodes.label: Frustration with AI for PowerPoint generation
nodes.grounding_span: the actual result of collaborating with an LLM on this is very frustrating

nodes.label: Preference for manual grading despite AI capability
nodes.grounding_span: I always grade papers manually, even though AI can do a decent job

nodes.label: Ambivalence about AI use due to social stigma
nodes.grounding_span: it's not exactly common or even socially accepted

nodes.label: Pessimism about future AI impact on critical thinking
nodes.grounding_span: I think it will get worse

nodes.label: Task-dependent delegation vs. collaboration
nodes.grounding_span: I have submitted a document to an LLM and asked the model to convert the notes into feedback in bulk. For emails, I collaborate.

nodes.label: Contextual holistic reasoning in grading
nodes.grounding_span: The whole context of the class is important
